snippets.C0621:
# Caso: FizzBuzz | Nivel: Básico | Categoría: Clásicos
function solve(n)
  out = String[]
  for i in 1:n
    s = (i%3==0 ? "Fizz" : "") * (i%5==0 ? "Buzz" : "")
    push!(out, isempty(s) ? string(i) : s)
  end
  out
end

snippets.D0001:
# Caso: Crear base de datos | Nivel: Básico | Categoría: Base de datos
# Julia (LibPQ) - ejemplo.
# ] add LibPQ
using LibPQ

function solve()
  conn = LibPQ.Connection(ENV["DATABASE_URL"])
  execute(conn, """CREATE DATABASE demo_db;""")
  close(conn)
end
snippets.D0002:
# Caso: Crear tabla | Nivel: Básico | Categoría: Base de datos
# Julia (LibPQ) - ejemplo.
# ] add LibPQ
using LibPQ

function solve()
  conn = LibPQ.Connection(ENV["DATABASE_URL"])
  execute(conn, """CREATE TABLE users (
  id bigserial PRIMARY KEY,
  name text NOT NULL,
  email text NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
);""")
  close(conn)
end
snippets.D0003:

# Julia (LibPQ) - ejemplo.
# ] add LibPQ
using LibPQ

function solve()

using LibPQ

function solve()
  conn = LibPQ.Connection(ENV["DATABASE_URL"])
  execute(conn, """SELECT id, name, email, created_at

WHERE email LIKE '%@demo.cl'

snippets.D0007:
# Caso: Join básico | Nivel: Intermedio | Categoría: Base de datos
# Julia (LibPQ) - ejemplo.
# ] add LibPQ
using LibPQ

function solve()
  conn = LibPQ.Connection(ENV["DATABASE_URL"])
  execute(conn, """SELECT u.id, u.name, o.id AS order_id, o.total
FROM users u
JOIN orders o ON o.user_id = u.id
ORDER BY o.created_at DESC;""")
  close(conn)
end

using LibPQ

function solve()
  conn = LibPQ.Connection(ENV["DATABASE_URL"])
  execute(conn, """INSERT INTO users(name, email)
VALUES ('Ana','ana@demo.cl')
ON CONFLICT (email) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name;""")

end

snippets.C0646:
# Caso: Validar RUT chileno | Nivel: Intermedio | Categoría: Validación
function solve(rut)
  clean = uppercase(replace(string(rut), r"[\.\-\s]" => ""))
  if length(clean) < 2
    return false
  end

  body = clean[1:end-1]
  dv = clean[end:end]

  if !all(isdigit, body)
    return false
  end

  sum = 0
  mul = 2
  for ch in reverse(body)
    sum += (Int(ch) - Int('0')) * mul
    mul = (mul == 7) ? 2 : (mul + 1)
  end

  mod = 11 - (sum % 11)
  dvCalc = (mod == 11) ? "0" : (mod == 10) ? "K" : string(mod)
  return dv == dvCalc
end

# C0650 · Leer/Escribir CSV (UTF-8) (Intermedio, IO)
# Julia · CSV.jl
# ] add CSV DataFrames
using CSV, DataFrames

function solve(input="input.csv", output="output.csv")
  df = CSV.read(input, DataFrame)
  if "Email" in names(df)
    df.Email = lowercase.(strip.(string.(df.Email)))
  end
  CSV.write(output, df)
end

snippets.C0680:
# C0680 · Uso de teclado (keydown/atajos) (Intermedio, UI/Entrada)
# Julia: stdin (Enter)
function solve()
  println("Escribe una tecla y Enter (w/a/s/d, q):")
  while true
    line = readline()
    if isempty(strip(line)); continue; end
    k = lowercase(first(strip(line)))
    if k == 'q'; break; end
    if k == 'w'; println("Mover: arriba"); end
    if k == 's'; println("Mover: abajo"); end
    if k == 'a'; println("Mover: izquierda"); end
    if k == 'd'; println("Mover: derecha"); end
  end
end
